name: GIGABYTE Z690 AORUS ELITE AX (rev. 1.x) ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-6000(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3,2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI - DisplayPort - 2.5GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax - BT 5.2
shortName: GIGABYTE Z690 AORUS ELITE AX (rev. 1.x) ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: ATX Intel Z690 gaming motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5-6000, and WiFi 6 connectivity.
